sizing_rule.note: Use fixed fractional basis to maximize geometric mean (G) by reducing standard deviation (SD) of trades. SD and arithmetic average HPR (A) affect G proportionally per Pythagorean Theorem. Specific f value not provided by author.

source_rule_text: On a fixed fractional basis, traders should maximize geometric mean (G) by reducing standard deviation (SD) of trades, as SD affects G proportionally equivalent to arithmetic average HPR (A) per the Pythagorean Theorem.
